source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from official Toyota pricing and shopping pages

finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Toyota.com lists a starting MSRP of $32,245 before destination processing and handling, taxes, title, license, registration, and dealer fees.
finance_snapshot.apr: Toyota financing offers vary by ZIP code, model, term, and approved credit; check Toyota deals and incentives for current regional programs.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Use the Toyota payment estimator or dealer quote for current monthly payment estimates.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Varies by lender approval, incentives, taxes, fees, and buyer structure.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Lease estimates vary by region, trim, mileage allowance, and available specials.
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Varies by dealer, taxes, fees, first payment, and any available incentives.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Toyota advertises regional deals and incentives that can change frequently and should be confirmed locally.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See Toyota Manuals and Warranties for the current model-year guide and exact coverage details.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Buyers who want pickup flexibility without moving into a full-size truck payment tier.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Strong name recognition in the midsize truck segment and broad trim visibility.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Popular truck trims and accessories can push the total cost well above the base MSRP snapshot.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Toyota.com all-vehicles pricing and Toyota support pages on March 26, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Dataset stores one canonical local image per vehicle. Canonical image refreshed on March 27, 2026 from an official manufacturer image asset chosen for a cleaner vehicle render.
